blended.narrative: Winter Park is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Mild temps with highs near 45°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 5" over the past week. Current depth: 37".
